patches.name: Change API endpoint
patches.description: Points the app to a custom backend server by modifying environment variables.

options.title: API URL
options.description: Enter the base URL for the API (e.g., https://my-proxy.t2c.fr)

patches.name: Force developer environment
patches.description: Replaces the production environment variables with the developer and staging ones.

patches.name: Remove Firebase tracking
patches.description: Removes Firebase App ID and Crashlytics API keys to disable Google tracking.

patches.name: Remove Google Maps API key
patches.description: Removes the Google Maps API key from the manifest to stop Google tracking.

patches.name: Remove Umami tracking
patches.description: Disables Umami tracking safely by modifying existing environment values.
